hct.source: Low HCT is a common finding in T1D due to chronic inflammation and impaired erythropoiesis.

hgb.source: Anemia is a common finding in T1D due to chronic inflammation and impaired erythropoiesis.

mch.source: Low MCH can be seen in T1D due to iron deficiency or impaired erythropoiesis.

mchc.source: Low MCH can be seen in T1D due to iron deficiency or impaired erythropoiesis.

mcv.source: Microcytosis (low MCV) can be seen in T1D due to iron deficiency or impaired erythropoiesis.

plt.source: Thrombocytosis can be seen in T1D due to increased platelet production.

rbc.source: Low RBC count is a common finding in T1D due to chronic inflammation and impaired erythropoiesis.

rdw.source: Elevated RDW can indicate increased red blood cell production variability, which can be seen in early T1D.

wbc.source: Elevated WBC count can indicate infection or inflammation, which can be associated with T1D.
